channel.title: reverse-engineering on Layle's Lair
channel.description: Recent content in reverse-engineering on Layle's Lair

item.title: RACEAC: Breaking Dead by Daylight's integrity checks
item.description: In an attempt to stop people from cheating by modifying game files, Dead by Daylight received an update that introduced integrity checks for the pak files/assets. Cheating was no longer possible. Unless…?

item.title: Breaking Dead by Daylight without process interaction
item.description: Is it possible to cheat in a game without any process interaction? Let’s find out.
